## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory meeting between Marcel Santilli (CEO of fwd.digital) and Ericksson Abad (potential finance hire) to discuss company background, growth plans, and potential role.](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth, with plans to scale from 25 to 120+ people by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [The company uses AI-powered workflows to provide efficient content marketing services at scale](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [There's a need for finance leadership to support aggressive growth while maintaining profitability](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [The role would involve setting up scalable financial processes and leveraging AI/automation](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Founded \~2 years ago, currently at $4.1M MRR with 60% win rate on deals](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Average deal size of $160k/year, largest at $400k/year](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Raised $12M, aiming to hire 100 people this year while only burning $4M](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Projecting to reach $30-60M ARR by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)

### Business Model and Technology

  - [Hybrid of AI-powered workflows and expert services for content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Built a framework representing AI workloads as code, allowing for scalable and customizable solutions](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Low software/infrastructure costs (5-10% of revenue) with main expenses being people and API consumption](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Financial Structure and Reporting

  - [Currently low software costs, mostly API consumption and some licenses](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Potential to structure revenue allocation between services and software/platform for financial engineering](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Need for strategic thinking on headcount planning, capital deployment, and scalable financial processes](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)

### Hiring Strategy and Company Culture

  - [Focusing on hiring senior, experienced leaders in growth marketing to drive sales and delivery](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Emphasis on using internal AI tools for recruiting and other operational processes](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Culture of extreme productivity and leveraging AI across all functions](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)

### Role Expectations and Compensation

  - [Need for a finance leader who can set up scalable processes and leverage AI/automation](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1384.0)
  - [Emphasis on being resourceful and applying company's AI capabilities to finance function](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Ericksson's current compensation is 167k euros, which seems aligned with expectations](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=2148.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to discuss with Bridget (presumed to be involved in hiring decision)](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Bridget to follow up with Ericksson, potentially today](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=2167.0)
  - [Ericksson to give 2 weeks notice and ensure knowledge transfer at current job (AirBide)](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=2081.0)
  - [Further discussions on specific role responsibilities and start date to be scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/3QoPJym8xNj3YbmDgWbzLi9FysfyXy5R?tab=summary&timestamp=2421.0)
